actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to the order of Friday, April 17, 2026,  the Journal ofthe proceedings of the Senate was deemed approved to date.
Pursuant to the order of Friday, April 17, 2026, the morning hour being deemed expired, and the times for the recognition of the two leaders being reserved.
The following transactions of morning business occurred on today.

S.Res. 681 (Sen. Lankford):
        A resolution relating to the life and death of Chuck Norris.

        -- Submitted in the Senate, considered, and agreed to without amendment and with a preamble by Voice Vote.

PN787-1:
        Andrew B. Davis, of Texas, to be United States District Judge for the Western District of Texas

        -- Considered by Senate.

        -- Confirmed by the Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 46. Record Vote Number: 86
By unanimous consent, on the request of Mr. Thune, at  6:33 p.m., the Senate adjourned, under its order of today, until 10 a.m. tomorrow.
